chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 116 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to non-prosecution of reference. 22.09.2025 This reference application is pending since 2018 and remains listed for orders as to non-prosecution. Diary demonstrates that on at least three occasions time was granted, however, the situation remains same. Even otherwise applicant remains unrepresented today without intimation or justification. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
